title: OCX Index Observation Object
description: Immutable, package-local CAS object at /p/<namespace>/<package>/o/sha256/<hex>.json. Records the set of platform to OCI manifest-digest pairs observed at one point in time (ADR: adr_locked_observation_index_format.md D4). Carries no timestamps, deliberately: identical platform sets produce byte-identical JSON, hence the same digest, hence automatic dedup across tags, packages, and observation time.

sha256Digest.description: OCI-style content digest, algorithm sha256, lowercase hex.

digest.description: OCI manifest digest for this platform on the physical registry. A different digest namespace from the root's tags[].content, which addresses this index's own CAS.

platform.description: Inline subset of the OCI image-spec Platform object (opencontainers/image-spec image-index.md). Field names with a literal dot (os.version, os.features) match the OCI spec's own property names verbatim, not a nested os object.
